action.description: May logistics release the export shipment?

context.action_boundary: May logistics release the export shipment?
context.anomaly_observed: The export packet includes a broad dual-use warning and requires exact license scope.

internal_documents.content: Shipment SHIP-ORI-2026-036 exports ECCN 5A992 sensor module to Chile for end user Andexa Mining.
Dual-use warning says similar sensor modules may require exact license review.
Export license LIC-ORI-036 covers ECCN 5A992 sensor module, destination Peru, end user Andexa Mining, effective before shipment.

policy_documents.content: Export release is complete only when license evidence matches ECCN, destination country, end user, and effective date before shipment.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
